title: <div>  •  Players can defect from factions but must undergo a betrayal trial.</d
content:
• Players can defect from factions but must undergo a betrayal trial.

✔ Item & Role Limitations
• Each faction can only have one leader at a time.
• Each faction gets ONE shared faction-wide buff per week.
• Items have strict limited availability (e.g., Legendary Artifacts = 1 per class).

✔ Party-Based Limitations
• No player can be in more than one party at a time.
• Parties cap at four members.
• Betraying a party is possible but costly.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Prevents over-stacking powerful groups.
✔ Ensures decision-making remains fair & competitive.
✔ Encourages tactical play over raw strength.

📜 3. Influence on Skill Checks & Interference Mechanics

📜 Skill checks can now be influenced by other players.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 464 (chunk 464/555)
